meta.title: About Pro-Tech Staffing | 30 Years in Industrial Staffing
meta.description: Pro-Tech Staffing has 30 years of experience in electronics manufacturing, industrial, and warehouse staffing. Six offices across TX, FL, CA, and AZ.

hero.heading: 30 years of staffing. Built on the production floor.
hero.description: Pro-Tech Staffing was founded in electronics manufacturing and grew into a full-service industrial staffing partner. We place workers in light industrial, warehouse, supply chain, and administrative roles across six US markets.
hero.imgAlt: Pro-Tech Staffing industrial workers on production floor

ourStory.heading:
Started in electronics.
Grew into industrial staffing.
ourStory.p1: Pro-Tech Staffing started over 30 years ago placing workers in electronics manufacturing — PCB assembly, SMT operations, soldering, and quality inspection. That foundation in precision, training, and accountability shaped everything we do.
ourStory.p2: Over time, our clients asked us to staff adjacent operations: warehouse teams, production lines, supply chain roles, and administrative support. We expanded because the work demanded it — not because we chased volume.
ourStory.p3: Today we operate six offices across Texas, Florida, California, and Arizona. Every market is staffed by local recruiters who know the employers, the roles, and the labor pool in their area.

beliefs.heading:
Principles that guide
how we operate.

staffingIsLocal.title: Staffing is local
staffingIsLocal.desc: Pay expectations, shift preferences, commute range, and labor competition all change by market. Our recruiters work in-market — not from a national call center.

screenForRole.title: Screen for the role, not just the resume
screenForRole.desc: Industrial roles require specific skills, physical capabilities, and reliability. We screen for the actual job — shift, site, and environment included.

stayInvolved.title: Stay involved after placement
stayInvolved.desc: We follow up with both the employer and the worker to make sure the fit is right. If something needs to change, we handle it fast.

doFewerThings.title: Do fewer things, do them well
doFewerThings.desc: We staff industrial, manufacturing, warehouse, and supply chain roles. That focus is intentional. We know these environments because we've worked in them for 30 years.

roleSpecific.title: Role-specific recruiting
roleSpecific.desc: We don't blast job boards and hope for the best. Our recruiters source candidates by role, shift, and site requirements — so the workers who show up are actually qualified for the job.

fillTime.title: 48-hour fill time
fillTime.desc: Most orders are filled within 48 hours. We maintain active pipelines of screened, ready-to-work candidates in every market so we can move fast when you need coverage.

localTeams.title: Local teams, real relationships
localTeams.desc: Every market is covered by a local recruiter. When you call, you're talking to someone who knows your facility, your roles, and your hiring patterns — not a call center.

offices.heading: Six markets. Local teams in each.
offices.description: We hire locally, recruit locally, and support our clients from offices that are close to the work.

richardson.desc: Corporate HQ serving the east DFW corridor — Dallas, Plano, Garland, Richardson.

bedford.desc: Covers Tarrant County — Fort Worth, Arlington, Irving, Grand Prairie, and the mid-cities.

austin.desc: Serving Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, and the Central Texas manufacturing corridor.

tampa.desc: Covering Tampa, Clearwater, St. Petersburg, and the Tampa Bay industrial market.

sanJose.desc: Electronics manufacturing staffing for San Jose, Santa Clara, Milpitas, and Fremont.

phoenix.desc: Serving Phoenix, Tempe, Mesa, and Chandler with industrial and warehouse staffing.

industriesOverview.heading: Focused on industrial. Not a generalist.
industriesOverview.description: We staff a specific set of industries because that focus is what makes us effective. Our recruiters know these environments, these roles, and what "good" looks like on the floor.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Whether you need workers or you're looking for work, we can help.
